personal.name: Muhammad Kamal khan
personal.title: Software Engineer - Python | Backend • Django • Flask • FastAPI
personal.bio: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building production-grade backend systems in Python. Skilled in Django/DRF, Flask, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, event-driven architectures, Docker, CI/CD, and cloud deployment. Experienced in designing RESTful APIs, system performance optimization, async workflows with Celery/Kafka/RabbitMQ, and maintaining high availability in production environments.

summary.introduction: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building production-grade backend systems in Python. Skilled in Django/DRF, Flask, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, event-driven architectures, Docker, CI/CD, and cloud deployment.
body: Experienced in designing RESTful APIs and system performance optimization
Built async workflows with Celery, Kafka, and RabbitMQ
Maintained high availability in production environments with comprehensive observability

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend)
description: Owned multiple Python backend services with Django/DRF in production, including deployments, monitoring, and incident resolution
Designed and evolved REST APIs serving thousands of daily active users
Reduced critical API latency by 40% using PostgreSQL indexing, query optimization, and Redis caching strategies
Executed zero-downtime PostgreSQL migrations with millions of rows while maintaining data integrity
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Git, Docker, and AWS
Implemented observability with Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, and CloudWatch for early issue detection

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend)
description: Designed and deployed backend APIs using Python, Flask, and MySQL
Optimized slow endpoints by 80–90% via query tuning and backend refactoring
Added unit and integration tests for maintainability
Worked with async workflows and event-driven systems using Celery, Kafka, and RabbitMQ

experience.title: Software Engineer
description: Built high-availability payment gateway APIs with Django REST Framework
Integrated financial APIs ensuring reliability and secure transactions
Collaborated with frontend and DevOps teams using Docker and PostgreSQL
Supported CI/CD pipelines and automated testing

experience.title: Python Backend Developer
description: Developed backend systems using Django REST Framework and PostgreSQL
Implemented real-time features with Django Channels and Kafka
Built event-driven workflows with Celery, Kafka, and RabbitMQ
Containerized services using Docker for consistent development and production environments
Implemented Elasticsearch search functionality for large datasets

experience.title: Python Backend Developer
description: Developed backend services using Django and Django REST Framework
Designed and optimized relational database schemas with PostgreSQL and SQL
Applied SOLID and DRY principles to maintainable backend codebases
